title: Generating a Summary of a Complex Technical Document
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a summary of a complex technical document with multiple sections, where each section has its own subtopics and sub-subtopics. The document is represented as a nested structure of lists and dictionaries.
constraints: Must include a section on each main topic with a summary of the subtopics and sub-subtopics

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated summary adhere to the constraints of being under 300 words and including a section on each main topic with a summary of the subtopics and sub-subtopics?
Does the generated summary correctly capture the main topics and subtopics of the document?
Is the generated summary readable and well-formatted?
